mapper.select: SELECT id, case_name, rule_id, rule_name_snapshot, last_result, last_output, last_run_time, crte_time, updt_time FROM rule_test_case ORDER BY crte_time DESC, id DESC
SELECT id, case_name, rule_id, rule_name_snapshot, last_result, last_output, last_run_time, crte_time, updt_time FROM rule_test_case WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rule_test_case (case_name, rule_id, rule_name_snapshot, last_result, last_output, last_run_time, crte_time, updt_time) VALUES (#{caseName}, #{ruleId}, #{ruleNameSnapshot}, #{lastResult}, #{lastOutput}, #{lastRunTime}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.update: UPDATE rule_test_case SET case_name = #{caseName}, updt_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, case_id, param_name, param_label_snapshot, param_type_snapshot, param_value, crte_time, updt_time FROM rule_test_case_param WHERE case_id IN #{caseId} ORDER BY case_id ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rule_test_case_param (case_id, param_name, param_label_snapshot, param_type_snapshot, param_value, crte_time, updt_time) VALUES (#{caseId}, #{paramName}, #{paramLabelSnapshot}, #{paramTypeSnapshot}, #{paramValue}, NOW(), NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT id, case_id, rule_id, run_status, output, error_message, start_time, finish_time, crte_time, updt_time FROM rule_test_run WHERE case_id = #{caseId} ORDER BY start_time DESC
SELECT id, run_id, log_time, log_type, message, crte_time, updt_time FROM rule_test_run_log WHERE run_id = #{runId} ORDER BY log_time ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO rule_test_run (case_id, rule_id, run_status, output, error_message, start_time, finish_time, crte_time, updt_time) VALUES (#{caseId}, #{ruleId}, #{runStatus}, #{output}, #{errorMessage}, #{startTime}, #{finishTime}, NOW(), NOW())
INSERT INTO rule_test_run_log (run_id, log_time, log_type, message, crte_time, updt_time) VALUES (#{runId}, #{logTime}, #{logType}, #{message}, NOW(), NOW())
